title: Tiatkin
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Tia}} {{Character |type=New Republic |image=[[File:Tiatkin.jpg]] |name=Tiatkin |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] |species=[[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Female]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin=[[Color/Legends|Orange]] |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Giza. Tiatkin. Can you find them?''"
"''That's why we're taking your money.|Lando and Tiatkin|{{Tales|5|Lando's Commandos: On Eagles' Wings}}}} '''Tiatkin''', also known as '''Tia''', was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] who worked with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] against the [[Eiattu pirates]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Radix]] alongside [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] and [[Giza]]. Tiatkin worked closely alongside Giza in their [[Tiatkin's starship|spaceship]]. She died in a battle against the pirates. {{Char-stub}} ==Appearances== *{{Tales|5|Lando's Commandos: On Eagles' Wings}} {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Tiatkin}} {{Reflist}} [[Category:Females]] [[Category:New Republic Starfighter Corps personnel]] [[Category:Twi'leks]]
